commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `before_assemble` and `after_assemble` plugin hooks, hook runner methods, embedded-runner call sites, and a changelog entry for context assembly interception.

Reproducibility: yes. Source review of the PR head is enough to reproduce the review findings: `before_assemble` can rewrite messages without the prompt-injection gate, `after_assemble` observes a stale system prompt, and live session arrays are passed directly to plugin code.
commands.review_followup: Manual maintainer/API review is required because this external feature PR changes a raw-conversation mutation contract, is dirty against current main, has blocking security/correctness findings, and still needs contributor-provided real behavior proof.
